zh.lifeSummary: 當Benjamin Childe於1592年8月7日出生在英國米德萊可維斯特明斯特時，他的父親Wolstone Childe22歲，母親Ellen Empson23歲。他於1628年11月27日與Sarah Shenton在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾可斯巴賀結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1634年11月在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾可斯巴賀享年42歲，埋葬在英國萊希斯特斯爾可斯巴賀。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Benjamin Childe于1592年8月7日出生在英国米德萊可維斯特明斯特时，他的父亲Wolstone Childe22岁，母亲Ellen Empson23岁。他于1628年11月27日与Sarah Shenton在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾可斯巴賀结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1634年11月在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾可斯巴賀享年42岁，埋葬在英国萊希斯特斯爾可斯巴賀。

nameMeanings.name: Childe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Child
meanings: nickname from Middle English child ‘child, infant’ (Old English cild), in various possible applications. The word is found in Old English as a byname, and in Middle English as a widely used affectionate term of address. It was also used as a term of status for a young man of noble birth, although the exact meaning is not clear; in the 13th and 14th centuries it was a technical term used of a young noble awaiting elevation to the knighthood. In other cases it may have been applied as a byname to a youth considerably younger than his brothers or to one who was a minor on the death of his father.
in Kent, possibly a topographic name from Old English cielde ‘spring (water)’, a rare word derived from c(e)ald ‘cold’.

nameMeanings.name: Benjamin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the youngest of the twelve sons of Jacob. His mother Rachel died in giving birth to him, and in her last moments she named him Benoni, meaning ‘son of my sorrow’. His father, however, did not wish him to bear such an ill-omened name, and renamed him Benyamin (Genesis 35:16–18; 42:4). This means either ‘son of the right hand’ or more likely ‘son of the south’ (Hebrew yamin can also mean ‘south’), since Benjamin was the only child of Jacob born in Canaan and not in Mesopotamia to the north. Another tradition is that the second element of the name is a variant of the Hebrew plural noun yamim, which means ‘days’ but is used idiomatically to mean ‘year’ or ‘years’. The name would then mean ‘son of (my) old age’ and refer to the fact that Benjamin was Jacob's youngest child. In the Middle Ages the name was often given to sons whose mothers had died in childbirth. Today it has no such unfortunate associations and it grew enormously in popularity following the release of the film The Graduate ( 1967 ), in which Dustin Hoffman played the role of Benjamin Braddock . It is used in Scotland as an Anglicized form of Gaelic Beathan .

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Benjamin Childe was born on 7 August 1592, in Westminster, Middlesex, England, his father, Wolstone Childe, was 22 and his mother, Ellen Empson, was 23. He married Sarah Shenton on 27 November 1628, in Cotesbach, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in November 1634, in Cotesbach, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 42, and was buried in Cotesbach, Leicestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Benjamin Childe est né le 7 août 1592, à Westminster, Middlesex, Angleterre, son père, Wolstone Childe, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Ellen Empson, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Sarah Shenton le 27 novembre 1628, à Cotesbach, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en novembre 1634, à Cotesbach, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 42 ans, et a été enterré à Cotesbach, Leicestershire, Angleterre.

ko.lifeSummary: Benjamin Childe(이)가 1592년 8월 7일 영국 미들레세스 웨스트민스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Wolstone Childe(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Ellen Empson(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1628년 11월 27일 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 컷스바치에서 Sarah Shenton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1634년 11월 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 컷스바치에서 42세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 레이스스터실르 컷스바치에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Sarah Shenton em 27 de novembro de 1628, em Cotesbach, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Benjamin Childe родился 7 августа 1592 г. в местности вестминстир, миддлесекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Wolstone Childe было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Ellen Empson, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Sarah Shenton 27 ноября 1628 г. в местности котесбач, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер ноябрь 1634 г. в местности котесбач, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 42 лет и был похоронен в местности котесбач, лисестиршир, Англия.
